title: Control of Goods (Essential Commodities) (Authorised Traders) Order, 1982

sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Control of Goods Title
sections.text:
This Order may be cited as the Control of Goods Title
(Essential Commodities) (Authorised Traders) Order, 1982.

sections.heading: The traders listed in the First Schedule a.re hereby Authorised
sections.text:
The traders listed in the First Schedule a.re hereby Authorised
authorised to trade in all essential commodities. traders

sections.heading: The powers of the Minister relating to the authorisation Delegation
sections.text:
The powers of the Minister relating to the authorisation Delegation
of traders contained in paragraph 3 and 4 of the Control of
S.I. No.
Goods (Essential Commodities) Regulations, 1981, a.re hereby 121 of
1981
delegated to the District Ex. ecutive Secretary of the district
in which the trader carries on business.

sections.heading: (1) Every application for authorisation to trade in Forms
sections.text:
(1) Every application for authorisation to trade in Forms
essential commodities shall be in Form I set out in the Second
Schedule.
(2) Every authorisation to deal in essential commodities
shall be in Form 2 set out in the Second Schedule.
R. CmsUPA.,
Minister of Commerce and Industry
LUSAX.A
18th March, 1982
[MOI.107/ 10/6]
